titleStmt.title: SII 34.290: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 290. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the Sabhāpati-maṇḍapa in the first prākāra in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: The nāṭṭār of Valla-nāḍu agreed to pay themselves all the dues which the priests of the temple at Tiruvaraṅguḷam had to pay towards the chūṟai-vari (war levy?) imposed on them by an officer called Aḷiyakētaṉ in the 10th year of Sundarapāṇḍyadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kōccaṭai paṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī vīrapāṇṭiya tēvaṟkku yā
ṇṭu 10 5 vatu Irācarācavaḷanāṭṭu vallanāṭṭu nāṭāy Icainta nāṭṭōm kalluveṭṭi ku
ṭutta paricāvatu Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉār kōyil civabrāhmaṇar pērāl
muṉpu cuntarapāṇṭiya tēvaṟkku 10vatu nāḷil Aḷiyakētaṉ yaṟkku cūṟaivariyāka ni
ccayitta kācil tiruvaraṉ kuḷattil civabrāhmaṇar pērāl nāṅkaḷ Iṭṭa piṟiyal pa
ṭiyāl Uḷḷakācum maṟṟum Ivarkaḷ pērāl varuvaṉa Eppēṟpaṭṭaṉavum nāṅ
kaḷ nāṭāka Ēṟṟukkoṇṭu nāṅkaḷḷēy Iṟuppōmāka Ippaṭi cammatit
tu kallilum cempilum veṭṭi kuṭuttu piṭipāṭum kuṭuttōm valla nā
ṭṭu nāṭāy Icainta nāṭṭōm Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉ kuḷamuṭaiya nāya
ṉār kōyil civabrāhmaṇaṟkku Ippaṭikku Ivarkaḷ colpaṭikku nāṭṭuk
kaṇakku vēḷāṉ Araṉkuḷapperumāḷ Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 34.290 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
